user.title: Set up Codex Bridge
user.description: Use the Home Assistant App for the private, recommended setup. External Bridge is an advanced legacy compatibility option.

app.title: Install or start the Codex Bridge App
app.description: Install the Codex Bridge App in Home Assistant Community Apps, start it, then retry. Home Assistant will discover its private endpoint and credentials automatically.

external.title: Connect an external legacy Bridge
external.description: Advanced compatibility setup. This accepts only a private legacy API v0 Bridge; use the Home Assistant App for current Codex features.

hassio_confirm.title: Connect the discovered Codex Bridge App
hassio_confirm.description: Home Assistant discovered {name}. Confirm to validate its private endpoint and add the Integration; retry if the App is temporarily unavailable.

error.cannot_connect: Home Assistant could not reach the Codex bridge service.
error.invalid_endpoint: Enter a valid private Bridge endpoint and token.
error.incompatible_api: This Bridge API is not compatible with the selected setup.
error.app_not_discovered: The App has not been discovered yet. Confirm that it is installed and running, then retry.
error.unknown: Unexpected error while validating the bridge connection.

abort.already_configured: Codex Bridge already has a configured connection.
abort.invalid_discovery: The App discovery data was invalid.
abort.cannot_connect: Home Assistant could not reach the App.
abort.incompatible_api: The App API is not compatible with this integration.
abort.unknown: The App could not be validated safely.
